items.title: Darline Graham Nordone, sister of Lindsey Graham, chosen to fulfill remainder of his US Senate term
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.dek: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.
items.body: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lindsey Graham's sister chosen as replacement after senator's death
items.dek: The South Carolina governor chose the senator's little sister to serve out the rest of his term after Graham's death on Saturday.
items.body: The South Carolina governor chose the senator's little sister to serve out the rest of his term after Graham's death on Saturday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
